description_long: This object consists of three distinct grave markers arranged side by side. The central marker is a prominent stone cross mounted on a rectangular pedestal, featuring a circular halo behind the cross arms. To the left is a tall, slightly curved rectangular headstone with a smooth surface and beveled edges. On the right is a smaller, rounded headstone with a carved cross relief on its face, set on a rectangular base. All markers are made of dark, weathered stone, giving them a somber and aged appearance. The surfaces are mostly smooth with subtle signs of wear, and the bases are broad and flat for stability. No visible inscriptions or detailed engravings are present on any of the markers.
description: A set of three dark stone grave markers: a central cross with a halo, a tall rectangular headstone, and a smaller rounded headstone with a carved cross.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three grave markers: the central cross with halo, the tall rectangular headstone on the left, and the smaller rounded headstone with a carved cross on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profiles of the grave markers, with the cross and headstones appearing as narrow vertical slabs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the grave markers, with the cross and headstones lacking any visible inscriptions or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profiles of the markers, similar to view 1.
